label: User Accounts
description: Authentication, profile management, settings, and role display components for user account systems

components.name: AuthForm
components.description: Login and register form with email and password fields. Supports toggling between login and register modes, forgot password link, loading state, and inline error display.
components.whenToUse: Use as the primary authentication entry point for login and registration pages. Ideal for auth landing pages where users need to sign in or create an account.

props.name: mode
props.description: Whether the form displays login or register fields

props.name: onSubmit
props.type: (data: { email: string; password: string; name?: string }) => void
props.description: Callback fired when the form is submitted with the entered credentials

props.name: onToggleMode
props.description: Callback to switch between login and register modes

props.name: onForgotPassword
props.description: Callback fired when the forgot password link is clicked

props.name: loading
props.description: Whether the form is in a loading/submitting state

props.name: error
props.description: Error message to display above or below the form

components.name: PasswordReset
components.description: Password reset request form that accepts an email address. Displays loading state during submission and a success message once the reset link has been sent.
components.whenToUse: Use on a dedicated password reset page or as a modal form triggered from the login screen. Provides a simple email input for requesting a password reset link.

props.name: onSubmit
props.description: Callback fired when the reset form is submitted with the email address

props.name: loading
props.description: Whether the form is in a loading/submitting state

props.name: success
props.description: Whether to display the success confirmation message

props.name: inputBg
props.description: Background color of the email input field

props.name: inputText
props.description: Text color of the email input field

components.name: MultiFactorAuthInput
components.description: Multi-factor authentication code input with configurable digit length. Renders individual digit boxes and fires a callback when all digits are entered.
components.whenToUse: Use after the initial login step when MFA is required. Provides a focused, accessible digit input for 2FA verification codes sent via SMS, email, or authenticator app.

props.name: length
props.description: Number of digit input boxes to display

props.name: onComplete
props.description: Callback fired when all digits have been entered

props.name: error
props.description: Error message to display below the input boxes

props.name: inputBg
props.description: Background color of the digit input boxes

props.name: inputText
props.description: Text color of the digit input boxes

components.name: ProfileOverview
components.description: Read-only profile card displaying user name, email, avatar, role, join date, and optional stat counters. Provides a quick summary of the user's account information.
components.whenToUse: Use on dashboard or profile pages to show the current user's identity and key statistics at a glance. Works well alongside editable settings or activity feeds.

props.name: avatar
props.description: URL of the user's avatar image

props.name: role
props.description: User role displayed as a label or badge

props.name: joinDate
props.description: Date the user joined, displayed in the profile card

props.name: stats
props.description: Array of stat items to display, each with a label and value

components.name: ProfileSettings
components.description: Editable profile form allowing the user to update their name, email, and avatar. Includes save and avatar change callbacks.
components.whenToUse: Use on settings or profile edit pages where the user can modify their personal information. Typically paired with ProfileOverview for a view/edit flow.

props.name: name
props.description: Current name value displayed in the name field

props.name: email
props.description: Current email value displayed in the email field

props.name: avatar
props.description: URL of the current avatar image

props.name: onSave
props.description: Callback fired when the user saves profile changes

props.name: onAvatarChange
props.description: Callback fired when the user selects a new avatar file

components.name: AccountSettings
components.description: Settings section list displaying categorized account options with labels, descriptions, icons, and optional action elements. Provides a structured layout for managing account preferences.
components.whenToUse: Use as the main settings hub on account settings or dashboard pages. Renders a list of configurable sections each with an optional action such as a toggle, button, or link.

props.name: sections
props.description: Array of settings sections: { id: string; label: string; description?: string; icon?: string; action?: ReactNode }

props.name: title
props.description: Title displayed at the top of the settings panel

components.name: RoleBadge
components.description: Compact badge displaying the user's role with variant-based color coding. Supports predefined variants for common roles and a custom variant with configurable color.
components.whenToUse: Use inline alongside user names, in profile cards, admin panels, or user lists to visually indicate a user's role or permission level.

props.name: role
props.description: The role label to display inside the badge

props.name: variant
props.description: Predefined role variant that determines the badge color scheme

props.name: color
props.description: Custom color override. Automatically derived from variant when not provided
